title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding

claims.text: Bidirectional pre-training with MLM substantially improves fine-tuning based approaches on a wide range of NLP tasks.
claims.source_text: We introduce a new language representation model called BERT, which stands for Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers.

methods.name: Masked Language Model (MLM)
methods.source_text: we mask some percentage of the input tokens at random, and then predict those masked tokens

methods.name: Next Sentence Prediction (NSP)
methods.source_text: we pre-train for a binarized next sentence prediction task

relations.explanation: Uses Transformer encoder architecture from Vaswani et al.

evidence.text: BERT's model architecture is a multi-layer bidirectional Transformer encoder based on the original implementation described in Vaswani et al.

relations.explanation: Adapts Transformer for bidirectional pretraining that beats prior unidirectional LMs on GLUE/SQuAD.

evidence.text: BERT obtains new state-of-the-art results on eleven natural language processing tasks

citation_contexts.sentence: BERT's model architecture is a multi-layer bidirectional Transformer encoder based on the original implementation described in Vaswani et al. (2017).
